nasb.text: This event became sin to the house of Jeroboam, even to blot it out and destroy it from off the face of the earth.

esv.text: And this thing became sin to the house of Jeroboam, so as to cut it off and to destroy it from the face of the earth.

cnv.text: 這事成為耶羅波安的家的罪，以致他的家從地上被塗抹與除滅。

ccb.text: 这罪使耶罗波安家走向没落，最终彻底灭亡。
